The '''crystal pickaxe''' is a [[pickaxe]] used in [[Mining]]. It requires 71 Mining and [[Song of the Elves]] to create and use, with 50 [[Agility]] and 70 [[Attack]] required to wield it. It possesses the same [[special attack]] as the [[dragon pickaxe]]. Excluding waiting for ores to respawn or having to move to a new resource, the crystal pickaxe is effectively a 3.03% increase in overall mining speed compared to a [[dragon pickaxe]] or 9.09% compared to a [[rune pickaxe]]. A charged crystal pickaxe provides a chance to mine an ore every three [[tick]]s (with an additional 1/4 chance to reduce this to two ticks); an uncharged crystal pickaxe has the same mining capabilities as a dragon pickaxe.

Players can create a crystal pickaxe via a [[singing bowl]] by combining a [[dragon pickaxe]], 120 [[crystal shard]]s, and a [[crystal tool seed]]. Doing so requires level 76 [[Smithing]] and [[Crafting]] to [[crystal singing|sing]] the crystal (the levels can be [[Temporary skill boost|boosted]]), and grants 6,000 experience in both skills. Players can configure the charges while the pickaxe is in their bank by right-clicking on Configure-Charges, as long as players have the required materials. If the player does not meet the Smithing and Crafting requirements, they can have [[Conwenna]] or [[Reese]] sing the crystal for them for an extra 60 crystal shards, for a total of 180.

A dangerous death in PvP causes the crystal pickaxe to revert to a dragon pickaxe, which will then be dropped for the killer. All crystal shards will be lost should this happen.

==Special attack==
[[File:Rock Knocker (crystal pickaxe).gif|frame|A player performs the crystal pickaxe's special attack, ''Rock Knocker''.]]
The crystal pickaxe's [[special attack]], ''Rock Knocker'', temporarily boosts the player's [[Mining]] level by 3 (players will need to have 70 [[Attack]] and 50 [[Agility]] to utilise this special). This consumes 100% of the player's special attack energy.

As long as a player can wield the pickaxe, requiring 50 Agility and 70 Attack, the special attack can be used to mine with the pickaxe starting at 70 Mining.

Note that any levels boosted above 99 with the special attack will be treated as 99. Therefore, you will start to receive diminishing returns with the special attack at level 97 and 98, with there being no value in activating the special attack at level 99.

==Charge Consumption==
When created, the crystal pickaxe starts off at 10,000 charges and consumes charges like all [[crystal equipment]], with one charge being consumed for each ore that is mined using it; once the pickaxe's charges have been fully depleted, it can still be used to mine, but will act like a dragon pickaxe. Wearing an [[elven signet]] or a [[celestial signet]] while using crystal equipment will provide a 10% chance to not consume charges.

The crystal pickaxe does not consume charges for certain activities where it provides no benefit compared to other pickaxes, or to a dragon pickaxe:
* Mining rocks in the [[Abyss]]
* Mining through a rockfall obstacle or fighting the [[Guardian (Chambers of Xeric)|guardians]] with a pickaxe in the [[Chambers of Xeric]]
* Mining the [[Boulder (Shaman Caves)|boulders]] in the [[Shaman Caves]]
* Mining [[salt]]s in the [[Salt Mine]]
* Mining the rubble in [[Burgh de Rott]] during [[In Aid of the Myreque]]
* Mining dense essence in the [[dense essence mine]]
* Mining the rockfalls at the [[Motherlode Mine]] (the ore veins do benefit)
* Mining barriers or [[Het's Seal]] within the Path of Het in the [[Tombs of Amascut]]
* Mining [[guardian fragments]] or [[guardian essence]] at [[Guardians of the Rift]] (provided your mining level has not been boosted)

{{bug|If the player's [[Mining]] level is visibly boosted, mining within Guardians of the Rift does consume charges, even after the boost decays. This can cease spontaneously but always stops when the player relogs.}}

In order to add charges to the crystal pickaxe, [[crystal shard]]s must be used on it (this can be done before it is inactive as well), with each shard granting 100 charges, up to a maximum of 20,000 (200 shards).

Using the shard cost of trading in [[Enhanced crystal teleport seed|enhanced crystal teleport seeds]] to [[Amrod]], the most efficient option for buying crystal shards directly, the cost per charge is {{Coins|{{GEP|Enhanced crystal teleport seed}}/15000}}. The cost per charge while using an [[elven signet]] or a [[celestial signet]] is {{Coins|{{GEP|Enhanced crystal teleport seed}}/16666.67}}.

Dismantling a crystal pickaxe will return the [[dragon pickaxe]] and [[crystal tool seed]] to the player. Doing so will lose all crystal shard charges that were previously added.
